rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §26.0031, which governs student rights regarding virtual and hybrid course enrollment. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 26.0031. RIGHTS CONCERNING VIRTUAL AND HYBRID COURSES.
_note: Rule text addresses virtual/hybrid course enrollment rights; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
